2606.14346.title: Squeeze-Release: Iterative Pruning with Exact Structural Minimization
2606.14346.paper_summary: Unstructured pruning produces sparse weight tensors, but the standard implementation keeps tensor shapes unchanged so the deployed model is no smaller than before pruning. We present an exact structural rewrite, which we call minimization, that converts a masked network into a smaller dense network with the same forward function up to floating-point rounding. The Squeeze-Release cycle iterates pruning and minimization with an intermediate release step that re-enables the exact-zero positions inside the compacted tensors as small calibrated noise, turning otherwise wasted capacity back into trainable parameters. Successive cycles use that capacity to find structural redundancy a single pass cannot reach. We additionally introduce CompensatedLayerNorm, a function-preserving replacement for LayerNorm that extends minimization to channel reduction across LayerNorm-equipped residual streams. Squeeze-Release compresses the deployable network to 39x smaller than the unpruned model on a fully-connected model network and 14.8x smaller on modern CNN (ConvNeXt-Tiny), at comparable accuracy. In addition we prove that the rewrite can be extended to transformer architectures.
2606.14346.paper_summary_zh: 非結構性剪枝產生稀疏的權重張量，但標準實現保持張量形狀不變，因此部署的模型在剪枝後並不比之前小。我們提出了一種精確的結構重寫，我們稱之為最小化，將一個被遮罩的網絡轉換為一個更小的密集網絡，其前向函數在浮點四捨五入的範圍內保持不變。擠壓-釋放循環通過一個中間釋放步驟迭代進行剪枝和最小化，該步驟重新啟用壓縮張量內的精確零位置，作為小的校準噪音，將原本浪費的容量轉回可訓練的參數。隨後的循環利用這些容量來尋找單次通過無法達到的結構冗餘。我們還引入了CompensatedLayerNorm，這是一個保留功能的LayerNorm替代品，將最小化擴展到跨LayerNorm裝備的殘差流的通道減少。擠壓-釋放將可部署的網絡壓縮到比未剪枝模型小39倍的全連接模型網絡和比現代CNN（ConvNeXt-Tiny）小14.8倍，且準確度相當。此外，我們證明了重寫可以擴展到Transformer架構。
2606.14346.author: Roman Denkin et.al.
2606.14346.authors: Roman Denkin, Ida Akerholm, Prashant Singh, Ida-Maria Sintorn
